f_a_q: How is the personal loan processing fee calculated?
lorem_ipsum_dolor_si: Processing fees are charges that are usually levied on the total loan amount sanctioned. Bajaj Finance charges 3.93% of the loan amount (inclusive of applicable taxes). For an instance, Rohit has taken a personal loan of Rs. 1 lakh, for which the processing fee of Rs. 3930 will be deducted from his sanctioned loan amount. The loan amount disbursed into his account will therefore be Rs. 96,070.

i_wanted_to_take_a_personal_loan_for_hom: I wanted to take a personal loan for home renovation. I had taken this personal loan directly through Bajaj Finserv. This loan was approved very quickly and the money was given to me in just one day. The customer care representative who checked my loan documents was also very helpful.
i_taken_a_personal_loan_from_bajaj_finse: I taken a personal loan from Bajaj Finserv on 2 years back. I am going to close the loan by next month. The tenure period I chosen for 2 years for the loan amount of 1.80L. The rate of interest is nominal 14% and Processing fee amount was deducted. There is pre closure option. EMI need to pay of 7,741 rupees
